title: KCP Date Sheet 2026 Out

detail.title: KCP Date Sheet 2026 Out
detail.short_info: KCP has released the PGDCA Semester II Date Sheet 2026 on the official examination portal. Check subject-wise exam dates, timings and download the official PDF online.

content.text: KCP has officially released the Date Sheet 2026 for PGDCA Semester II examinations. Students enrolled in the PGDCA programme can now check and download the official KCP Date Sheet 2026 for Semester II from the examination portal. It is advised to carefully review the schedule and prepare for the upcoming exams.

KCP has released the examination date sheet specifically for PGDCA Semester II. The schedule includes all subjects of the second semester. Students are advised to download the official PDF to view the complete subject-wise examination dates and timings.

sections.heading: How to Download KCP Date Sheet 2026

content.text: Students can download the KCP Date Sheet 2026 easily from the official website by following the steps given below:

items: Visit the official KCP examination website.
Go to the Date Sheet or Notice section.
Locate the PGDCA Semester II Date Sheet 2026 link.
Click on the link to open the PDF.
Download and save the file on your device.
Take a printout for ready reference during exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in KCP Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The official KCP Date Sheet 2026 for PGDCA Semester II contains all necessary information for students. The key details mentioned in the date sheet include:

items: Programme name and semester
Examination dates and days
Subject names with paper codes
Timing of each examination
Important instructions for candidates
General guidelines.
Official Date Sheet PDF: Click Here
Official Website: Click Here
